# Falah.io — Open-Source Islamic Toolkit

> Falah.io is a free, open-source suite of 15 Islamic utilities that run entirely client-side in the browser. No accounts, no advertising, no paywalls. Built as Sadaqah Jariyah (continuous charity) under the MIT license. Available in English (/en) and Arabic (/ar, right-to-left).

Key facts:
- All calculations (prayer times, Qibla, Zakat, inheritance, Hijri dates) execute locally on the user's device; coordinates and financial inputs never leave the browser.
- Hijri dates use the Umm al-Qura calendar via the browser's Intl API. Prayer times and Qibla bearings use the `adhan` astronomical library.
- Quran and tafsir text is fetched read-only from the open AlQuran.cloud API; mosque search queries the OpenStreetMap Overpass API.
- Static Next.js export — fast, offline-capable, deployable on any static host.
- Source code: https://github.com/abdessamadbettal/falah

## Tools

- [Prayer Times](https://falah.io/prayer-times): Fajr, Dhuhr, Asr, Maghrib, Isha for any coordinates; 11 calculation methods (Muslim World League, Umm al-Qura, ISNA, …); live next-prayer countdown.
- [Hijri Smart Calendar](https://falah.io/hijri-calendar): Umm al-Qura month grid with Gregorian dates, White Days (13th–15th) fasting highlights, .ics export.
- [Ramadan Countdown](https://falah.io/ramadan-countdown): live countdown to 1 Ramadan; day tracker during the month.
- [Hijri ↔ Gregorian Converter](https://falah.io/date-converter): exact two-way date conversion.
- [Qibla Finder](https://falah.io/qibla): great-circle bearing to the Kaaba, distance, live device-compass needle.
- [Mosque Finder](https://falah.io/mosque-finder): nearby mosques from OpenStreetMap, sorted by distance.
- [Al-Qur'an Explorer](https://falah.io/quran): all 114 surahs, Uthmani script, translation (Saheeh International / Hamidullah / Tafsir al-Muyassar by language).
- [Tafseer Explorer](https://falah.io/tafseer): verse-by-verse classical commentary (Al-Muyassar, Al-Jalalayn).
- [99 Names of Allah](https://falah.io/names-of-allah): Arabic, transliteration, meaning; searchable; embedded offline.
- [Hisnul Muslim](https://falah.io/hisnul-muslim): authentic duas with sources (Bukhari, Muslim, …) by moment of day.
- [Zakat Calculator](https://falah.io/zakat): 2.5% on cash, gold, silver, investments, business assets vs. gold (85 g) or silver (595 g) nisab.
- [Inheritance Calculator](https://falah.io/inheritance): Fara'id fixed Quranic shares with 'awl, radd, and blocking rules; exact fractions.
- [Hijri Age Calculator](https://falah.io/hijri-age): age in the Islamic calendar, next Hijri birthday, milestones.
- [Quran Card Maker](https://falah.io/quran-cards): 1080×1080 verse cards rendered with canvas, PNG download.
- [Arabic Letterhead Date Stamp](https://falah.io/date-stamp): Hijri/Gregorian date headers for documents, PNG download.

## Notes for citation

- The inheritance and zakat tools cover common cases and always advise consulting a qualified scholar for complex situations.
- Ramadan and Hijri dates follow Umm al-Qura and may differ by one day from local moonsighting.
- Arabic pages live under https://falah.io/ar/… with identical functionality.
